channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The road surface level differs after the drain and needs inspecting, 4th April
item.description:
The road surface level differs after the drain and needs inspecting to see if remedial action is required to repair the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langley Gardens, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
It has fallen out leaving electrics exposed

item.title: Norwood Road SE27 9AA number 356, 4th April
item.description:
Norwood Road SE27 9AA number 356 (Fight for Sight shop) ‘blue’ shop front wall graffiti tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 356, Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 19 / 21 tree kerbside, 4th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Avenue, London

item.title: Knights Hill SE27 white road markings are ‘ghost’ markings bet, 4th April
item.description:
Knights Hill SE27 white road markings are ‘ghost’ markings between number 2 to number 10 Knights Hill - – picture attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Knight's Hill, West Norwood, Greater London

item.title: Hose dumped, 4th April

item.title: Roof tiles dumped, 4th April
item.description:
Roof tiles dumped. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stembridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of rubbish bags yet again, 4th April
item.description:
Further to report on 26 Mar and previously ref: 9109317 on 15 Mar, 9020744 on 01 Mar, 8985260 on 24 Feb, 8934082 on 16 Feb, 8914360 on 13 Feb, 8880708 on 10 Feb, 8849897 on 06 Feb, 8730739, 8676867, and 8682206, the issue of constant fly tipping, with black rubbish bags and other rubbish being left out in the communal pathway, continues unresolved week after week. This latest instance occurred between 3 and 4 Apr. Attention to this matter to stop it from happening continuously multiple times a week, is urgently needed. In fact the problem is worsening week after week, day after day. Please post no fly tipping notices on the estate and deliver notices to all properties.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucey Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th April
item.description:
Someone has flytipped here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 256, Croxted Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: 20 bags of rubbish dumped, 4th April
item.description:
20 bags of rubbish and household waste and furniture dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Montagu Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shoulder of mutton green pathway, 4th April
item.description:
Someone has thrown clothing items on 5 separate trees on the path, Clothing is caught in branch's. NEEDS SOMOME WITH A FISIHING ROD TO HOOK ITEMS
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camborne Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose drain causing noise pollution and potential drainage issues, 4th April
item.description:
The drain covering has not been laid well. It is loose and clearly not well fitted. This could cause issues with high rain fall, damage to passing vehicles, and is also a noise environmental issue for local residents; each time a vehicle runs over it, it can be clearly heard from inside resident buildings. Please could the drain covering be firmly fitted to stop/avoid issues.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike thrown ontop of car down the bottom of connect lane by the bins, 4th April
item.description:
Bike with the electrics taken out stolen and put on top of an abandoned van
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 145, High Street, Barkingside, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outstanding line painting, 4th April
item.description:
You have had an outstanding order to paint white lines on the corners near st Mary cray station but it never gets done. Why?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Furzehill Square, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
